Tests the Math.asin function for input slightly greater than 1 to confirm it returns NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that checks the behavior of the `Math.asin` function in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to verify that the result of `Math.asin(1.000000000000001)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). The test ensures that the `Math.asin` function correctly handles input values slightly greater than 1, which are outside the valid domain for the arcsine function. This script provides narrow functionality focused on validating a specific mathematical operation.
